query:
SELECT pp.id, pp.projectId, pp.subcategory, pp.photoUrl, p.name as projectName 
FROM projectPhotos pp 
JOIN projects p ON pp.projectId = p.id 
WHERE pp.subcategory = 'renders' 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT pp.id, pp.projectId, pp.subcategory, pp.photoUrl, p.name as projectName 
FROM projectPhotos pp 
JOIN projects p ON pp.projectId = p.id 
WHERE pp.subcategory = 'renders' 
LIMIT 5;
